name: Kinocut Public Guide
description: A public, read-only guide to Kinocut installation, video-editing workflows, safeguards, and documentation. It cannot edit media, access local files, upload, publish, purchase, or run commands.

skills.name: Kinocut Workflow Guide
skills.description: Routes a public video-editing goal to relevant Kinocut installation, workflow, receipt, and safety documentation without touching media or running tools.

skills.name: Kinocut Safety Boundaries
skills.description: Explains preflight, Video Receipt, quality, and human-review boundaries for local Kinocut workflows.
